history.content:
<thought>
I am at the left side of the top corridor facing right. The cell directly ahead is lava, so I should avoid moving forward into it. The safest path appears to be going downward from here, so I will turn right to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing down at the same position. The cell below me is open, so I can move forward safely to continue toward the lower open corridor and eventually the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I have moved one cell down and am still facing down. The path below is blocked by lava, so I should not continue forward. The open route seems to be to the right via the middle corridor, so I will turn left to face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right and the cell ahead is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. To reach the open corridor below and then the goal on the lower right, I should turn right to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down, but the cell directly ahead is lava, so I cannot move forward. The open path is to my right, leading toward the clear corridor and then the goal, so I should turn left to face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right again, and the cell ahead is lava. The safe move is to go downward into the open corridor, so I need to turn right to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am back facing down, but the cell ahead is lava, so I should not move forward. To reach the open corridor below, I need to turn left to face right, then I can navigate around the obstacle.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing right, and the path ahead is blocked by lava. The open route to the goal is below in the central corridor, so I should turn right to face down and then continue downward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down, and the cell directly ahead is open corridor, so the best next step is to move forward toward the lower passage that leads to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am still facing down, but the cell ahead is blocked by lava. To continue toward the open corridor, I need to turn left so I face right, where there is a clear path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right, and the space directly ahead is blocked by lava. The open route toward the goal is below me, so I should turn right to face downward and then move through the clear corridor.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down and the cell ahead is a wall, so I cannot move forward. To reach the open passage, I need to face right again.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right again, but lava is directly ahead, so moving forward would be unsafe. The safer route is downward through the open corridor, so I should turn right to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down. The cell ahead is open floor, so I can proceed downward toward the corridor.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am still facing down, and the next cell ahead is open floor. Continuing forward keeps me moving through the safe corridor toward the lower passage.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am now in the corridor and still facing down. The cell ahead is lava at the bottom edge of the corridor, so I should avoid moving forward and instead turn right to head toward the goal along the open passage.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing left, but the goal is to the right side of the map. To head toward the open passage leading to the goal, I need to turn around by rotating clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing up now, and the path ahead is blocked by open floor toward the upper area, but the goal is still to the right and below. To continue toward the goal corridor, I should turn right to face east.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right and have a clear corridor ahead along the row. Moving forward will take me closer to the right side, toward the column that leads down to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am still facing right in the open corridor. The goal is farther to the right and then down, so the best next step is to keep advancing forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am still facing right and there is open space ahead. Continuing forward moves me closer to the opening near the right side, which leads toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right and the path ahead is clear. Moving forward is the best way to keep approaching the opening that leads down toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right with open floor ahead, so moving forward continues toward the right-side route leading down to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am still facing right and the tile ahead appears to be open floor. Continuing forward keeps me progressing toward the corridor near the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right at the far end of this row, and moving forward would likely hit the wall. I need to turn to head downward toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>
